component.name: navetted
component.summary: Self-hosted AI agent remote control daemon

description.p: navetted is a Rust PTY daemon that lets you drive Claude Code sessions from a React Native mobile app. Zero cloud relay — works with your own API key, Bedrock, or Vertex.
Features: multi-session support, tool approval with timeout, push notifications via ntfy, multi-agent support (claude/codex/gemini/aider), session history, scheduled launches.
Initial release with multi-session, approval timeout, push notifications, and multi-agent support.
